notes: Track B Phase 1+2 baseline (2026-04-25 rerun). Run against a clean-rebuilt devenv (dev/start -p 3.13 -i miniforge -u) so conda is imported from <workspace>/conda/conda/. Plugged in, idle desktop, no thermal throttle. Package cache warmed by hyperfine's own --warmup 1 run for W1/W2; W3 is dry-run and exercises cached repodata only. Linux counterpart runs inside docker/ (OrbStack, arm64 Ubuntu 24.04, ext4). Full reproducibility verified: 2026-04-25 numbers are within ±5% of 2026-04-24 initial run at every workload and suspect.
